title: VideoContract
description: Schema for VideoDeliverableRequest and VideoResult. Cambium-side glue only; does not vendor any OpenMontage code.

VideoDeliverableRequest.title: VideoDeliverableRequest
VideoDeliverableRequest.description: Input to the render-video skill. All facts shown on screen must trace to source_ledger_ids with Proved or Code-verified status.

title.description: Human-readable title for the video deliverable.

platform_profile.description: Render profile name matching an OpenMontage pipeline_defs/ profile (e.g. 'youtube-1080p', 'twitter-square', 'journal-mp4'). The user's installed OpenMontage determines the valid set.

source_ledger_ids.description: IDs of findings ledger entries whose status is Proved or Code-verified. Only these facts may appear on screen.

narration_text.description: Full narration script. Every factual claim must correspond to an entry in source_ledger_ids.

style.description: Optional visual style hint passed to OpenMontage (e.g. 'minimal', 'data-driven', 'nature-documentary'). Absent means OpenMontage uses its default.

budget_cap_usd.description: Maximum spend in USD for AI API calls, stock assets, and rendering. Render MUST NOT proceed if projected cost would exceed this value.

real_footage_only.description: If true, instructs OpenMontage to use only real (non-AI-generated) footage and imagery. Required true for submissions to funders that prohibit AI-generated imagery.

VideoResult.title: VideoResult
VideoResult.description: Output record from the render-video skill after OpenMontage completes. Written into governance/provenance.json.

output_path.description: Filesystem path to the rendered video file.

purpose.description: What this provider was used for (e.g. 'narration', 'b-roll selection', 'colour grading').

providers_used.description: All AI providers and models invoked by OpenMontage during this render. Required for the AI Use Statement.

decision_log_ref.description: Path or URL to OpenMontage's own decision log for this render.

cost_actual_usd.description: Total cost in USD incurred for this render. Must not exceed VideoDeliverableRequest.budget_cap_usd.

asset_id.description: Unique identifier or filename of the asset.

provider.description: Source or AI provider for this asset (e.g. 'pexels', 'archive.org', 'nasa', 'wikimedia', 'piper-tts', 'openai-dall-e').

license.description: License string (e.g. 'CC0', 'Pexels License', 'CC BY 4.0', 'NASA public domain'). Must be compatible with distribution platform.

ai_assets_disclosed.description: Every AI-generated or AI-selected asset used in the video. Required for disclosure; must be complete before self_review_passed can be true.

self_review_passed.description: True only when all checks in SKILL.md section 8 pass: ledger IDs resolve, budget not exceeded, all assets disclosed, licenses verified, no non-consensual likeness, decision_log_ref written.
